BcftoolsVariantCalling.auto_determine_se.description: Automatically determine sex from CRAM file if sex parameter not provided (default: true)

BcftoolsVariantCalling.base_file_name.description: Base name for all output files

BcftoolsVariantCalling.chrx_nonpar_bed.description: BED file with X chromosome non-PAR regions

BcftoolsVariantCalling.chrx_par_bed.description: BED file with X chromosome PAR (pseudoautosomal) regions

BcftoolsVariantCalling.chry_nonpar_bed.description: BED file with Y chromosome non-PAR regions (used for XY samples)

BcftoolsVariantCalling.cpus.description: Number of CPUs for variant calling tasks

BcftoolsVariantCalling.input_cram.description: Input CRAM file with aligned reads

BcftoolsVariantCalling.memory_gb.description: Memory in GB for variant calling tasks

BcftoolsVariantCalling.num_autosome_shar.description: Number of shards to split autosomes for parallel processing

BcftoolsVariantCalling.reference_genome.description: Genome type for reference selection (hg38, b37). Reference files are automatically selected based on this value.

BcftoolsVariantCalling.run_filtering.description: Whether to generate filtered gVCF using depth and GQ thresholds

BcftoolsVariantCalling.sex.description: Sample sex: XX (female) or XY (male). If not provided and auto_determine_sex=true, will be determined automatically from CRAM
